article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.6. Provincial Housing Target Order 6-Month Interim Progress Report - 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider Approving Burnaby's 6-Month Housing Target Progress Report
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on authorizing staff to submit Burnaby's first progress report to the BC Ministry of Housing, showing 910 new homes were completed in the first six months of a provincial order requiring 10,240 new units by 2030. Slowing construction and a pause in provincial affordable housing funding are putting future targets at risk.
briefs.action_required: If you work in construction or development, monitor this file — slowing housing starts and funding cuts may affect your project pipeline.
